# Blue Collar Techy

Practical tech, AI, and local SEO for blue-collar business owners. Hosted by Nick Conley, a former hardscape contractor who now runs a marketing and tech company for the trades (Tekton Growth).

> Blue Collar Techy exists to cut through the noise of marketing, AI, and tech for contractors and trades owners. Honest diagnostic frameworks, practical how-tos, and free tools that use real data.

## About
- [About Nick Conley](https://bluecollartechy.com/about.html): Ten years running Tekton Design Build (custom hardscape, outdoor living, stone work) before pivoting into marketing. Now helps blue-collar businesses grow with AI, local SEO, and practical systems.

## Core Perspective
- The "market, agency, you" framework: when leads slow down, the cause is almost always in one of three buckets. Diagnose in order. Don't blame the agency before checking whether the market moved or the owner-side fundamentals are leaking calls.
- No guru content. No "transform your business in 30 days." Just working tools and breakdowns.

## Blog Posts
- [I tested the $99 AI SEO tool contractors are being sold](https://bluecollartechy.com/blog/i-tested-the-99-ai-seo-tool.html): First-person review of a popular $99 lifetime AI SEO platform after running every feature against BCT. Ten buttons, six real tools, one broken. Generated articles contain fabricated statistics (a made-up plumbing case study). No local SEO execution (no GBP audit, no grid rank tracking, no citations, no location pages, no schema, no reviews). Five-question test for evaluating any AI SEO tool before buying. Includes a waitlist for the Local Lead Engine, an upcoming BCT tool that handles the local SEO execution these content tools skip.
- [How to get more Google reviews as a contractor](https://bluecollartechy.com/blog/how-to-get-more-google-reviews.html): The three-ask playbook (in-person, same-day text, 3-day email) with exact scripts, plus the new March 2026 Google policy rules (no incentives, no employee reviews, retroactive enforcement).
- [When leads dry up, is it the market, the agency, or you?](https://bluecollartechy.com/blog/market-agency-or-you.html): The three-bucket diagnostic. How to tell whether your marketing agency is failing, the market moved, or the owner side has leaks. Start here.
- [10 things no marketing agency can fix for you](https://bluecollartechy.com/blog/ten-things-no-agency-can-fix.html): The full list of owner-side habits that kill contractor businesses. Grouped by speed, reputation, and sales. Ranked by damage.
- [Audit your Google Business Profile in 15 minutes](https://bluecollartechy.com/blog/gbp-audit-15-minutes.html): Seven checks any contractor can do themselves. Covers ownership, categories, services, photos, posts, and review health.
- [Your market is up but sales are down. What now?](https://bluecollartechy.com/blog/market-up-sales-down.html): What to do when the demand scan shows green but deals aren't closing. Covers price-aware markets, the two-pool model (SEO vs paid social), the right diagnostic order, and the two real ways through a tight market (better sales + wider net).

## Free Tools
- [Market Demand Scan](https://bluecollartechy.com/market-scan/): Pulls 24 months of Google search demand data for your trade in your city. Year-over-year comparison. Tells you whether the market actually moved or something else is going on.
- [GBP Health Check](https://bluecollartechy.com/gbp-check/): Pulls your live Google Business Profile, compares you to the top contractors in your area, scores on nine dimensions (claim status, categories, phone, website, hours, photos, review count vs competitor median, star rating), and returns a priority fix list.
- [Branded QR Code Generator](https://bluecollartechy.com/qr-generator/): Client-side tool that turns any link (typically a Google review URL) plus a logo into a print-ready branded QR code. PNG or SVG download. Works for truck magnets, signage, invoices, business cards.

## Free Resources
- [Crew Review Training Cheat Sheet](https://bluecollartechy.com/resources/crew-cheat-sheet/): One-page printable for training a crew on the three-moment review ask. Scripts, owner-vs-crew roles matrix, a crew bonus structure that stays Google-compliant under the March 2026 policy update, and a weekly owner checklist.

## Services
- [Work with Nick](https://bluecollartechy.com/work-with-me.html): Direct contact. Submit what you're trying to do with AI, marketing, local SEO, or systems.
- [Tekton Growth](https://tektongrowth.com): Done-for-you SEO and marketing agency for contractors. Runs in parallel with Blue Collar Techy.
